_comment: 10 user prompts that are easy to route to the WRONG tool when descriptions are vague. expected_tool is the gold answer. Several are genuinely ambiguous on purpose (see notes).

cases.prompt: Look up the customer Acme Corporation

cases.note: bare number reads as an order id

cases.prompt: Show me everything for Jane Doe

cases.note: asks about an order's customer, but you start from the order id
AMBIGUOUS: a bare number could be an order id or a customer account; gold treats unprefixed numbers as order ids

cases.prompt: Find the order from Wayne Enterprises
cases.note: AMBIGUOUS: wants an order, but only gives a company name. You can't call search_orders without an id, so resolve the customer first
